title: Model Assignment & Ollama Integration (Phase 13):
job:
Model Assignment & Ollama Integration (Phase 13):

1. Model Assignment System:
   - Add GUI settings panel for model selection per task level (drafting, revision, export)
   - Create `config/models.py` for model definitions
   - Update SQLite store to track model assignments

2. Runner Selection Logic:
   - Develop algorithm to match tasks with appropriate model runners
   - Add priority-based model selection for critical tasks

3. Ollama Integration:
   - Add GUI section to list/manage Ollama instances
   - Implement Ollama instance discovery via GUI
   - Create `workers/ollama_runner.py` for model execution

4. Artifacts:
   - Model assignment system
   - Runner selection logic
   - Ollama integration framework
   - Phase 14 roadmap
